channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PSB] PSB: Director Shankar Lal Agarwal Retires
item.description:
Shankar Lal Agarwal, a Part-Time Non-Official Director on the Board of Punjab & Sind Bank, has retired upon the completion of his one-year tenure. His appointment was effective from April 11, 2025, as per a Government of India notification. The bank has informed the stock exchanges about this change in directorship, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shankar Lal Agarwal retired from PSB's Board.
  • He served as Part-Time Non-Official Director.
  • His one-year tenure concluded as per notification.
  • The change is reported under SEBI Regulation 30.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB & SIND BANK | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JASH] Jash Eng FY26 Revenue Flat at ₹736 Cr; Projects FY27 Growth to ₹875 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jash Engineering Ltd reported consolidated unaudited revenue of ₹736 Cr for FY25-26, showing no growth over FY24-25's ₹735 Cr and falling short of the revised projection of ₹775-800 Cr. This shortfall is attributed to US tariff issues and the Middle East war, which caused dispatch delays. The company projects a consolidated sales revenue target of ₹875 Cr for FY26-27, representing approximately 19% growth, factoring in potential global economic slowdowns. March 2026 saw an order intake of ₹57 Cr, contributing to a consolidated order book of ₹827 Cr as of April 1, 2026. The US tariff has been reduced to approximately 15% from 50%, and the company has initiated refund claims. Investment plans for manufacturing facilities in the USA and Saudi Arabia have been deferred due to current uncertainties.

  • FY25-26 revenue flat at ₹736 Cr, below projection due to US tariffs and Middle East war.
  • FY26-27 revenue projected at ₹875 Cr, targeting 19% growth despite global uncertainties.
  • Order book strong at ₹827 Cr as of April 1, 2026, with significant international contribution.
  • US tariff reduced to 15% from 50%; company initiated refund claims for excess charges.
  • Investment in US and Saudi Arabia manufacturing facilities deferred due to geopolitical risks.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jash Engineering Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MOTHERSON] Samvardhana Motherson: Croatian subsidiary SMRC-Croatia dissolved
item.description:
Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd announced the voluntary dissolution of its indirect wholly-owned subsidiary, SMRC Automotive Interior Modules Croatia d.o.o. (SMRC-Croatia). The Commercial Court of Zagreb dissolved SMRC-Croatia from its register, effective April 11, 2026. The dissolution was initiated by SMRC-Croatia due to a lack of foreseeable new business and significant annual operating costs. In FY 2024-25, SMRC-Croatia's turnover was Euro 256,362 and its net worth was €6,448. These figures represent a negligible 0.00% contribution to the consolidated revenue and net worth of Samvardhana Motherson International Limited.

  • Samvardhana Motherson's Croatian subsidiary, SMRC-Croatia, dissolved.
  • Dissolution effective April 11, 2026, due to no new business.
  • SMRC-Croatia's FY25 turnover was Euro 256,362, net worth €6,448.
  • Financial impact on consolidated revenue and net worth is negligible.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail opens new Express Baazar store in Balasore, total 270
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Baazar Style Retail Ltd has announced the opening of a new Express Baazar store in Balasore, Odisha. This latest addition increases the company's total store count to 270 as of the current date. The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, signaling the company's ongoing strategy for retail network expansion.

  • New Express Baazar store opened in Balasore, Odisha.
  • Total store count for Baazar Style Retail now stands at 270.
  • Reflects the company's continued retail network expansion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [IBREALEST] Embassy Developments Sells Sepset Real Estate for ₹100 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Embassy Developments Ltd, along with its wholly-owned subsidiary Ceres Estate Limited, has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement with Pen India Limited for the sale of 100% of the equity share capital of Sepset Real Estate Limited. Sepset, which owns the 'Mega Mall' commercial project in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, will cease to be a subsidiary upon completion of the transaction. The aggregate cash consideration for the sale is ₹100 Crore, to be received in one or more tranches. The transaction, expected to be completed within 60 days, reflects the company's focus on active portfolio management and disciplined capital allocation. This divestment aims to unlock value, strengthen the balance sheet, and enable redeployment of capital into core markets and high-growth opportunities. In the financial year ended March 31, 2025, Sepset contributed ₹18.55 crore to turnover and had a net worth of ₹(-)114.07 crore.

  • Embassy Developments to divest 100% stake in Sepset Real Estate.
  • Sale consideration is an aggregate cash amount of ₹100 Crore.
  • Sepset owns the 'Mega Mall' project in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
  • Transaction aims to unlock value and strengthen the balance sheet.
  • Proceeds will be redeployed into core markets and high-growth opportunities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIABULLS REAL ESTATE LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [ADANIGREEN] Adani Green Energy gets 87.3 ESG rating from Care ESG
item.description:
Adani Green Energy Ltd has been assigned an ESG rating of 87.3 by M/s Care ESG Ratings Limited. The company received this information on April 10, 2026. This rating reflects the company's performance across environmental, social, and governance parameters, which is a key metric for investors focused on sustainable and responsible investing.

  • Adani Green Energy received an ESG rating.
  • Care ESG Ratings assigned a score of 87.3.
  • ESG ratings are vital for investor confidence.
  • Reflects company's commitment to sustainability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Green Energy Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [FIVESTAR] Five-Star Business Finance: Independent Director's Tenure Ends
item.description:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd announced that Ms. Bhama Krishnamurthy has completed her second term of five consecutive years as an Independent Director. Consequently, she ceased to be an Independent Director of the company effective from the close of business hours on April 11, 2026. This change is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and relevant SEBI Master Circulars.

  • Independent Director Ms. Bhama Krishnamurthy's tenure concluded.
  • She ceased to be a director from April 11, 2026.
  • Cessation is due to completion of her second five-year term.
  • This is a routine compliance-related management change.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Five-Star Business Finance Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [HUDCO] HUDCO signs 2 MoUs with NBCC for redevelopment & asset monetization
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) has signed two Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with NBCC (India) Limited on April 11, 2026. The first MoU outlines collaboration for the redevelopment of an approximately 18830 sqmt leasehold plot at Block No. 25, August Kranti Bhawan, Bhikaji Cama Place, New Delhi. This includes techno-economic feasibility studies, construction, project management, and monetization of built-up space. The second MoU focuses on undertaking Asset Monetization activities for NBCC’s self-sustainable model projects. Under this, HUDCO will provide funds for ongoing and upcoming projects of NBCC, with the permission of the Government of India, while NBCC will offer project management and consultancy services. These MoUs aim to leverage the respective strengths of both parties for effective implementation of these initiatives.

  • HUDCO and NBCC signed two MoUs on April 11, 2026.
  • First MoU targets redevelopment of a 18830 sqmt plot in New Delhi.
  • Second MoU focuses on asset monetization for NBCC projects.
  • HUDCO to fund NBCC's self-sustainable projects with GoI permission.
  • NBCC will provide project management and consultancy services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [BLUECLOUDS] Blue Cloud Softech EGM to Increase Authorized Capital to ₹96 Cr
item.description:
Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd has announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. via Video Conferencing/OAVM. The EGM will seek shareholder approval for two special businesses: to increase the company's Authorised Share Capital from ₹80,00,00,000 to ₹96,00,00,000, and to amend the Memorandum of Association accordingly. Additionally, the EGM will consider and, if thought fit, pass a special resolution for the issuance of equity shares on a preferential basis for consideration other than cash. The company has provided e-voting facilities, which will commence on May 1, 2026, and conclude on May 3, 2026.

  • EGM scheduled for May 4, 2026, to approve capital changes.
  • Authorized share capital to increase from ₹80 Cr to ₹96 Cr.
  • Shareholders to vote on preferential issue of equity shares.
  • E-voting facility available from May 1 to May 3, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [NCLIND] NCL Industries Q4 FY26: Cement Prod. Up 2%; Doors, Boards See Sharp Declines
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NCL Industries reported mixed operational performance for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026. Cement production increased by 2% to 8,02,600 MT in Q4 FY26 and 2% to 27,68,119 MT for the full year. Cement dispatches also saw modest growth. However, Cement Boards production declined significantly by 51% in Q4 and 39% for the year. RMC production and sales decreased by 5% in Q4 and 12% for the year. Door production and sales saw a drastic fall of 100% in Q4 and 94% for the full year. Energy (Hydro Power) generation was down 21% in Q4 but up 3% for the full year.

  • Cement production grew 2% in Q4 FY26 and 2% for the full year.
  • Cement Boards production plummeted 51% in Q4 and 39% for FY26.
  • Door production and sales dropped 100% in Q4 and 94% for FY26.
  • RMC production and sales declined 5% in Q4 and 12% for FY26.
  • Hydro Power generation decreased 21% in Q4 but rose 3% for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NCL INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Updates
